exam_format: Multiple-choice (computer-based); 170 scored questions + 20 unscored pilot items
exam_price_notes: $115 at ATI testing center. School-administered sittings may vary.

testing_centers.notes: In-person testing available on-campus at a school or testing center with an in-person proctor.

prerequisites.description: High school diploma or GED. Required by nursing/allied health programs.

retake_policy.notes: 40% of test-takers must retake the TEAS.

official_study_resources.title: TEAS Study Guide
official_study_resources.notes: Includes 4 subject areas, key terms, exam tips, and 325 end-of-each-section quiz questions.

official_study_resources.title: TEAS Practice Test
official_study_resources.notes: Includes Form A and Form B, offering different sets of questions.

official_study_resources.title: SmartPrep Tutorial
official_study_resources.notes: Interactive lessons, practice questions, and detailed rationales.

official_study_resources.title: TEAS Mobile App
official_study_resources.notes: Free version available; access to up to 2300 questions with detailed rationale.

aliases: test of essential academic skills version 6
